entries.statement: Ranking cannot modify canonical standing, grades, receipts, robustness, or support structure.

canonical.statement: Ranking cannot modify canonical standing, grades, receipts, robustness, or support structure.

entries.statement: The active ranking objective is always visible to the user.

canonical.statement: The active ranking objective is always visible to the user.

entries.statement: Behavioral observation is opt-in and default off.

canonical.statement: Behavioral observation is opt-in and default off.

entries.statement: Personal profile records cannot enter public contribution patches.

canonical.statement: Personal profile records cannot enter public contribution patches.

entries.statement: Profile data is local by default.

canonical.statement: Profile data is local by default.

entries.statement: No telemetry endpoint exists beyond the capability manifest's declarations, which declare none.

canonical.statement: No telemetry endpoint exists beyond the capability manifest's declarations, which declare none.

checking_records.method: observed-network-behavior evidence (kernel/governance/local-source-classes.md): runs api/community.js under a stubbed global fetch and asserts every URL it actually requests is one of manifests/network.json's declared destinations

canonical.method: observed-network-behavior evidence (kernel/governance/local-source-classes.md): runs api/community.js under a stubbed global fetch and asserts every URL it actually requests is one of manifests/network.json's declared destinations

entries.statement: The periphery imports no kernel or store module; the API is the sole membrane.

checking_records.method: static-analysis evidence (kernel/governance/local-source-classes.md): statically parses every import statement in periphery/, api/, and kernel/governance/ and asserts each stays within its membrane zone (periphery reaches vendor/kernel only through api/; api/ imports only vendor/ and itself)

canonical.method: static-analysis evidence (kernel/governance/local-source-classes.md): statically parses every import statement in periphery/, api/, and kernel/governance/ and asserts each stays within its membrane zone (periphery reaches vendor/kernel only through api/; api/ imports only vendor/ and itself)

entries.statement: This client holds no capability any client with the snapshot lacks.

canonical.statement: This client holds no capability any client with the snapshot lacks.

entries.statement: Artifacts produced by the founding flow are client-neutral: no reference to this app in any kernel, snapshot, card, or contribution target it emits.

canonical.statement: Artifacts produced by the founding flow are client-neutral: no reference to this app in any kernel, snapshot, card, or contribution target it emits.

entries.statement: Admission judges bundles, never the producing client.

canonical.statement: Admission judges bundles, never the producing client.

entries.statement: A citation cannot become an independent confirmation by being pasted.

canonical.statement: A citation cannot become an independent confirmation by being pasted.

entries.statement: Gate passage, admission, and semantic acceptance render as three distinct states, and no rendering implies the next.

canonical.statement: Gate passage, admission, and semantic acceptance render as three distinct states, and no rendering implies the next.

entries.statement: A release's declared artifact hash matches the built artifact.

canonical.statement: A release's declared artifact hash matches the built artifact.

entries.statement: A client can switch providers without presentation changes.

canonical.statement: A client can switch providers without presentation changes.

entries.statement: The credential seam exists; identity thresholds are stored inactive and nothing evaluates them.

canonical.statement: The credential seam exists; identity thresholds are stored inactive and nothing evaluates them.

entries.statement: The patch-history seam exists; bundle identity is content-derived and nothing depends on durable history.

canonical.statement: The patch-history seam exists; bundle identity is content-derived and nothing depends on durable history.

entries.statement: The standing-economy seam exists; the reserved fields are read by nothing.

canonical.statement: The standing-economy seam exists; the reserved fields are read by nothing.

entries.statement: All inherited substrate code matches the lock.

checking_records.method: recomputes the sha256 of every vendored file and compares it to upstream/lock.json; recomputes the upstream/epistack submodule's checked-out commit and compares it to lock.commit_hash

canonical.method: recomputes the sha256 of every vendored file and compares it to upstream/lock.json; recomputes the upstream/epistack submodule's checked-out commit and compares it to lock.commit_hash

sources.description: knowledge-game-spec-v2.md (this deployment's own specification, Sections 2, 5, and 9) and kernel/governance/stage-0.md, the asserting source for every governance claim this kernel carries about the app's own behavior
